prompt: Photorealistic photograph of ultra-premium 700gsm triplex business cards with gold painted edges (edge painting in warm gold hex #C9A96E), displayed at a slight angle on dark grey linen fabric surface to showcase the painted gold edge detail. The cards are standard rectangular (90mm x 55mm) with square corners. The card face is matte black with soft-touch lamination. The front displays the LK Design and Build logo: two parallel horizontal datum lines with small tick marks, a dashed vertical centreline, and 'LK' in clean geometric Futura centred between the datum lines, rendered in gold foil. Below reads 'DESIGN AND BUILD' in tracked uppercase capitals. The back of the card shows contact details centred in gold type, exactly reading: 'Lyda Kieng' (name), 'Designer | Project Manager' (title with pipe separator), '0481 742 026' (phone), 'Po Box 583 Prospect East SA 5082' (address), 'lyda@lkdesignandbuild.com.au' (email). The edge painting is clearly visible on the card stack — a rich warm gold stripe along all four edges of the thick card stock, approximately 2mm visible. A stack of 8-10 cards with the top card slightly offset to reveal the gold edges beneath. Shot at 45 degree angle with 85mm lens at f/2.8, soft directional lighting from upper right highlighting the gold edge paint and foil details, very shallow depth of field, dark luxurious mood, editorial product photography. Match the dark premium aesthetic and gold foil print quality from the reference image.
negative_prompt: cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright colours, cluttered, glossy, low quality, deformed, top-down flat angle, white background, rounded corners, thin cards, wrong text, placeholder text
